result.stdout:
Usage: /tmp/inspectra-help-luau-cli-0.1.6-300bdd5db2d7459e87b14c097a706223/tool/.store/luau-cli/0.1.6/luau-cli/0.1.6/tools/net9.0/any/tools/linux/luau [options] [file list] [-a] [arg list]

When file list is omitted, an interactive REPL is started instead.

Available options:
  --coverage: collect code coverage while running the code and output results to coverage.out
  -h, --help: Display this usage message.
  -i, --interactive: Run an interactive REPL after executing the last script specified.
  -O<n>: compile with optimization level n (default 1, n should be between 0 and 2).
  -g<n>: compile with debug level n (default 1, n should be between 0 and 2).
  --profile[=N]: profile the code using N Hz sampling (default 10000) and output results to profile.out
  --timetrace: record compiler time tracing information into trace.json
  --codegen: execute code using native code generation
  --program-args,-a: declare start of arguments to be passed to the Luau program

Commands:
  analyze  Run static analysis (including type checking and linting).
  ast      Outputs the abstract syntax tree of a Luau script as json.
  compile  Dump the bytecode of a Luau script.
  dluau    Analyzes C# files in the project and generates .d.luau file.

When file list is omitted, an interactive REPL is started instead.

Available options:
  --coverage: collect code coverage while running the code and output results to coverage.out
  -h, --help: Display this usage message.
  -i, --interactive: Run an interactive REPL after executing the last script specified.
  -O<n>: compile with optimization level n (default 1, n should be between 0 and 2).
  -g<n>: compile with debug level n (default 1, n should be between 0 and 2).
  --profile[=N]: profile the code using N Hz sampling (default 10000) and output results to profile.out
  --timetrace: record compiler time tracing information into trace.json
  --codegen: execute code using native code generation

Commands:

  dluau    Analyzes C# files in the project and generates .d.luau file.

result.stdout:
Usage: /tmp/inspectra-help-luau-cli-0.1.6-300bdd5db2d7459e87b14c097a706223/tool/.store/luau-cli/0.1.6/luau-cli/0.1.6/tools/net9.0/any/tools/linux/luau-compile [--mode] [options] [file list]

Available modes:
   binary, text, remarks, codegen

Available options:
  -h, --help: Display this usage message.
  -O<n>: compile with optimization level n (default 1, n should be between 0 and 2).
  -g<n>: compile with debug level n (default 1, n should be between 0 and 2).
  --target=<target>: compile code for specific architecture (a64, x64, a64_nf, x64_ms).
  --timetrace: record compiler time tracing information into trace.json
  --record-stats=<granularity>: granularity of compilation stats (total, file, function).
  --bytecode-summary: Compute bytecode operation distribution.
  --stats-file=<filename>: file in which compilation stats will be recored (default 'stats.json').
  --vector-lib=<name>: name of the library providing vector type operations.
  --vector-ctor=<name>: name of the function constructing a vector value.
  --vector-type=<name>: name of the vector type.

result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet luau dluau [path] [options]

Analyzes C# files in the project and generates .d.luau file

Available options:
  -h, --help: Display this usage message.
  -o, --output: output path
